context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: In our otel-integration setup with a central gateway, APM shows traces but no error rates and no p99 latencies. The agen

checklist.name: no-recommend-running-spanmetrics-on-both-agen
checklist.description:
The response MUST meet every one of these points to be CORRECT: 1. Identifies that `spanmetrics` on the gateway only sees sampled
   traces — so APM metrics undercount errors and latencies.
2. Recommends moving `spanmetrics` to the AGENT pipeline, upstream of
   any sampling (either as a connector on the agent, or emitting into
   a dedicated spanmetrics metrics pipeline exported direct to
   Coralogix from the agent).
3. Mentions that the `transactions` / `groupbytrace/transactions`
   processor must run BEFORE `spanmetrics` so the cgx.transaction
   dimensions are populated on the metrics.
4. Does NOT recommend increasing the sample rate as a workaround. 5. Does NOT recommend running spanmetrics on both agent AND gateway
   (that causes double-counting).
